name: Wreck Of The Gamma
region: North America, Cayman Islands, Grand Cayman
description: The wreck of the Gamma lies off Grand Cayman, resting at 60 feet on a sandy bottom. This 180-foot freighter sank in 1980 and is now encrusted with colorful sponges and corals. Schools of grunts and snappers hover around the structure, while moray eels peek from the holds. The shallow depth and calm conditions make it ideal for divers of all levels. Nearby reefs add to the site's appeal, with occasional turtle and stingray sightings. Visibility often exceeds 100 feet, offering clear views of the wreck's intact bow and deck.
